jni_interface_generator.py

00001 import os,sys
00002 from str_code import *
00003 
00004 
00005 primitive_types=['byte',"boolean","int","char","long","float","double"]
00006 primitive_signatures=['B',"Z","I","C","J","F","D"]
00007 is_primitive_type_last_index=-1
00008 def is_primitive_type(s_typ):
00009     ix=-1
00010     global is_primitive_type_last_index
00011     is_primitive_type_last_index=-1
00012     for s in primitive_types:
00013         ix+=1
00014         if (s_typ==s):
00015             is_primitive_type_last_index=ix
00016             return 1
00017     return 0
00018 def get_signature_type(typ):
00019     if (is_primitive_type(typ)):
00020         return primitive_signatures[is_primitive_type_last_index]
00021     elif (typ=="String"):
00022         return "Ljava/lang/String;"
00023     elif (typ=="Object"):
00024         return "Ljava/lang/Object;"
00025     elif (typ=="Class"):
00026         return "Ljava/lang/Class;"
00027     elif (typ=="Thread"):
00028         return "Ljava/lang/Thread;"
00029     elif (typ=="int[]"):
00030         return "[I"
00031     elif (typ=="byte[]"):
00032         return "[B"
00033     elif (typ=="long[]"):
00034         return "[J"
00035     elif (typ=="float[]"):
00036         return "[F"
00037     elif (typ=="double[]"):
00038         return "[D"
00039     elif (typ=="char[]"):
00040         return "[C"
00041     return "L"+typ+";"
00042 
00043 def append_signature_type(s,typ):
00044     sig=get_signature_type(typ)
00045     le_sig=len(sig)
00046     if le_sig==1:
00047         s+=sig
00048     elif (le_sig)==2:
00049         if sig[0]=='[':
00050             s+=sig
00051         else:
00052             s+=sig
00053         return s
00054     else:
00055         s+=sig#as class
00056     return s;
00057     
00058     
00059         
00060         
00061             
00062 class FuncParam:
00063     def __init__(self,typ,name):
00064         self.typ=typ
00065         self.name=name
00066     def __str__(self):
00067         s="Param={ "+self.typ+" "+self.name+"}, "
00068         return s
00069     def toString(self):
00070         s=self.typ+" "+self.name
00071         return s
00072     def getType(self):
00073         return self.typ
00074     def getName(self):
00075         return self.name
00076 class ParamList:
00077     def __init__(self):
00078         self.list=[]
00079     def __str__(self):
00080         s=""
00081         i=-1;
00082         
00083 class JNIFunc:
00084     def __init__(self,class_,name,orig_name):
00085         self.class_name=class_
00086         self.orig=orig_name
00087         self.public=0
00088         self.static=0
00089         self.final=0
00090         self.protected=0
00091         self.native=1
00092         self.resultType=''
00093         self.params=[]
00094         self.synchronized =0
00095         self.name=name
00096     def __str__(self):
00097         s="JNIFunc={ "
00098         if (self.static):
00099             s+=" static"
00100         s+=" "+self.resultType
00101         s+=" "+self.class_name+"::"
00102         s+=" "+self.name
00103 
00104         s+=" ("
00105         if len(self.params)!=0:
00106             #s+=str(self.params)
00107             s+=self.getJavaParamList()
00108         s+=");}"
00109         s+="\n//"+self.orig
00110         return s
00111     def addParam(self,param):
00112         self.params.add(param)
00113     def getJavaParamList(self):
00114         s=""
00115         i=-1
00116         hi= len(self.params)-1
00117         for param in self.params:
00118             i+=1
00119             #s+=str(param)
00120             s+=param.toString()
00121             if (i<hi):
00122                 s+=","
00123         return s
00124     def getJelatineCFuncname(self):
00125         classname=self.class_name.replace('/','_')
00126         full_func_name=classname+"_"+self.name 
00127         return full_func_name
00128     def toJelatineJNIInterface(self,NoStaticCMod=0):
00129         kni_ret_type=self.getJNI_C_return_type()
00130         comment="//"+str(self)+"\n"
00131         s=""
00132         if(NoStaticCMod==0):
00133             s+="static "
00134         s+=kni_ret_type+" "
00135         full_func_name=self.getJelatineCFuncname()
00136         s+=full_func_name+"(void)"
00137         func_decl=comment+"extern "+s
00138         s=comment+s
00139         s+="\n{"
00140         startDef,num_handles,has_end_handles_in_end_def,endDef=self.getJNIReturnTypeValueDefinition()
00141         primitive_defs,handles_defs,get_actions=self.getParamHandlesDefs()
00142         middleDef=''
00143         if (num_handles==0):#primitive type
00144             if len(startDef)>0:
00145                 s+="\n\t"+startDef
00146             startDef=''
00147         if len(primitive_defs)>0:
00148             s+=primitive_defs
00149         if not(self.static):
00150             num_handles+=1
00151             startDef+="KNI_DeclareHandle(this_ref);\n\t"
00152             middleDef="KNI_GetThisPointer(this_ref);"
00153         num_handles+=len(handles_defs)
00154         if (num_handles>0):
00155             s+="\n\tKNI_StartHandles("+str(num_handles)+");"
00156 
00157         if len(startDef)>0:
00158             s+="\n\t"+startDef
00159         for hand_def in handles_defs:
00160             s+="\n\t"+hand_def
00161         if len(middleDef)>0:
00162             s+="\n\n\t"+middleDef
00163         if len(get_actions):
00164             s+=get_actions
00165         s+="\n\n\tfprintf(stdout,\"\\nIn "+full_func_name+"!\");"
00166         if (num_handles>0) and not has_end_handles_in_end_def:
00167             s+="\n\tKNI_EndHandles();"
00168         if len(endDef)>0:
00169             s+="\n\t"+endDef
00170         s+="\n}\n"
00171         return (s,func_decl);
00172     def getJNI_C_return_type(self):
00173         kni_predef='KNI_RETURNTYPE_'
00174         rt=self.resultType
00175         if (rt=="int[]"):
00176             return kni_predef+"OBJECT"
00177         elif (rt=="byte"):
00178             return kni_predef+"OBJECT"
00179         elif (rt=="Thread"):
00180             return kni_predef+"OBJECT"
00181         
00182         ret_type=kni_predef+trim_str(self.resultType.upper())
00183         return ret_type
00184     def getParamHandlesDefs(self):
00185         primitive_defs=""
00186         handles_defs=[]
00187         get_actions=""
00188         i=-1
00189         hi= len(self.params)-1
00190         sp=1;
00191         
00192         for param in self.params:
00193             typ=param.getType()
00194             name=param.getName()
00195             if (is_primitive_type(typ)):
00196                 decl="j"+typ+" "+name+";"
00197                 primitive_defs+="\n\t"+decl
00198                 typ2=typ[0].upper()+typ[1:]
00199                 get_actions+="\n\t"+name+"=KNI_GetParameterAs"+typ2+"("+str(sp)+");"
00200                 sp+=1
00201                 if (typ=="double") or (typ=="long"):#64 bit value
00202                     sp+=1;
00203             else:
00204                 handles_defs.append("\n\tKNI_DeclareHandle("+name+");")
00205                 get_actions+="\n\tKNI_GetParameterAsObject("+str(sp)+","+name+");"
00206                 sp+=1
00207             #elif (typ==)
00208         return (primitive_defs,handles_defs,get_actions)    
00209     def getJNIReturnTypeValueDefinition(self):
00210         
00211         rt=self.resultType
00212         #print 'rt:'+rt+":"+str(len(rt))
00213         if (rt=="void"):
00214             return ("",0,0,"\n\tKNI_ReturnVoid();");
00215         if (is_primitive_type(rt)):
00216             rt2=rt[0].upper()+rt[1:]
00217             endDef="\n\tKNI_Return"+rt2+"(ret);\n"
00218             return ('j'+self.resultType+" ret;",0,0,endDef)
00219         if (rt=="String"):
00220             endDef="//KNI_NewStringUTF(str, str_ref);\n\tKNI_EndHandlesAndReturnObject(str_ref);"
00221             return ("char *str;KNI_DeclareHandle(str_ref)",1,1,endDef)
00222         if (rt=="Thread"):
00223             return ("KNI_DeclareHandle(thread_ref);",1,1,'KNI_EndHandlesAndReturnObject(thread_ref);')
00224         elif (rt=="byte[]"):
00225             #return ""
00226             return ("KNI_DeclareHandle(byte_array_ref);",1,1,'KNI_EndHandlesAndReturnObject(byte_array_ref);')
00227         elif (rt=="int[]"):
00228             return ("KNI_DeclareHandle(int_array_ref);",1,1,'KNI_EndHandlesAndReturnObject(int_array_ref);')
00229         if (rt=="Object"):
00230             endDef="//\n\tKNI_EndHandlesAndReturnObject(obj_ref);"
00231             return ("KNI_DeclareHandle(obj_ref)",1,1,endDef)
00232         return ("",0,0,"")
00233     
00234     def getSignatureDescriptor(self):
00235         r="("
00236         param_signature=""
00237         for param in self.params:
00238             param_signature=append_signature_type(param_signature,param.getType())
00239         r+=param_signature+')'
00240         if (self.resultType=='void'):
00241             r+='V'
00242         else:
00243             r+=get_signature_type(self.resultType)
00244         return r
00245     def toJelatineJNISignatureDescriptor(self):
00246         r="\n{"
00247         r+="\n\t\""+self.class_name+"\","
00248         r+="\n\t\""+self.name+"\","
00249         r+="\n\t\""+self.getSignatureDescriptor()+"\","
00250         r+="\n\t"+self.getJelatineCFuncname()+"\n},"
00251         return r;
00252         
00253         
00254     
00255     def parseParams(self,param_list):
00256         #lst=[]
00257         self.params=[]
00258         if (param_list==None):
00259             return
00260         for s3 in param_list:
00261             s3=s3.replace(']','] ')
00262             param_sp=splitBySpace(s3)
00263             
00264             if len(param_sp)<2:
00265                 raise Exception("parseParams Error!len(param_sp)<2"+str(param_list))
00266             typ,name=param_sp[0],param_sp[1]
00267             find_d_brak=name.find('[]')
00268             
00269             while(find_d_brak>=0):
00270                 typ+='[]'
00271                 le=len(name)
00272                 if find_d_brak==0:
00273                     name=name[2:]
00274                 else:
00275                     name=name[0:le-2]
00276                 find_d_brak=name.find('[]')
00277                 
00278             f_param=FuncParam(typ,name)
00279             self.params.append(f_param) 
00280         
00281 def get_func_proto_name(prototype):
00282     fi_brak=prototype.find("(")
00283     if (fi_brak<0):
00284         return None
00285     sub_str=prototype[:fi_brak]
00286     sp=splitBySpace(sub_str)
00287     le=len(sp)
00288     return sp;#[le-1]
00289 def get_param_list_part(prototype):
00290     fi_brak=prototype.find("(")
00291     fi_brak2=prototype.find(")")
00292     if (fi_brak<0) or (fi_brak2<0):
00293         print prototype
00294         print "\tNot correct prototype-method!"
00295         
00296         return None
00297     sub_str=trim_str(prototype[fi_brak+1:fi_brak2])
00298     if len(sub_str)==0:
00299         return None
00300     sp=sub_str.split(',')
00301     le=len(sp)
00302     return sp;#[le-1]
00303     
00304 def load_jni_interfaces(src_data):
00305     #ret_list=[]
00306     funcs=[]
00307     for s in src_data:
00308         s2=trim_str(s)
00309         if (s2.find('#')==0):
00310             continue
00311         if len(s2)==0:
00312             continue
00313         f_dp=s2.find(':')
00314         if (f_dp<=0):
00315             raise Exception("Not found separator ':'")
00316         fi_end=s2.find(';')
00317         if (fi_end>0):
00318             s2=s2[:fi_end]
00319         sp_dp=s2.split(':')
00320         if len(sp_dp)<2:
00321             raise Exception("Error !len(sp_dp)!=2")
00322         full_class_name=trim_str(sp_dp[0])
00323         if full_class_name.startswith('./'):
00324             full_class_name=trim_str(full_class_name[2:])
00325         lo_s=full_class_name.lower()
00326         if (lo_s.endswith('.java')):
00327             le_full_class_name=len(full_class_name)
00328             full_class_name=full_class_name[:le_full_class_name-5]
00329         prototype=trim_str(sp_dp[1])
00330         
00331         prototype_func_name_sp=get_func_proto_name(prototype)
00332         if (prototype_func_name_sp==None):
00333             raise Exception("Err!prototype_func_name_sp==None")
00334         le_sp=len(prototype_func_name_sp)
00335         if (le_sp<2):
00336             raise Exception("Err!le_sp<2")
00337         prototype_func_name=prototype_func_name_sp[le_sp-1]
00338         func=JNIFunc(full_class_name,prototype_func_name,prototype)
00339         #sp=splitBySpace()
00340         in_param_list=0;
00341         is_done=1
00342         ix=-1
00343         typename=""
00344         for s3 in prototype_func_name_sp:
00345             ix+=1
00346             if ix==(le_sp-1):
00347                 break
00348             if (s3=='public'):
00349                 func.public=1
00350             elif (s3=='private'):
00351                 func.public=0   
00352             elif (s3=='static'):
00353                 func.static=1
00354             elif (s3=='native'):
00355                 func.native=1
00356             elif (s3=='final'):
00357                 func.final=1
00358             elif (s3=='protected'):
00359                 func.protected=1
00360             elif (s3=="synchronized"):
00361                 func.synchronized =1
00362             else:
00363                 typename=typename+" " +s3
00364         func.resultType=trim_str(typename)
00365         sp=get_param_list_part(prototype)
00366         
00367         if (sp==None):
00368             #void param list
00369             funcs.append(func)
00370             continue
00371         func.parseParams(sp)
00372         funcs.append(func)
00373     return funcs
00374 def gen_jelatine_jni_interfaces(funcs):
00375     r="""//Base of this source been was generated by jni_interfaces_generator.py
00376 
00377 #include "wrappers.h"
00378 
00379 #include "interpreter.h"
00380 #include "jstring.h"
00381 #include "kni.h"
00382 #include "loader.h"
00383 #include "native.h"
00384 #include "thread.h"
00385 #include "utf8_string.h"
00386 #include "util.h"
00387 #include "vm.h"
00388 
00389 #include "java_lang_String.h"
00390 #include "java_lang_Thread.h"
00391 
00392     """
00393     jel_struct_native_declares=""
00394     funcs_rels=""
00395     funcs_defs=""
00396     for f in funcs:
00397         s,def_f= f.toJelatineJNIInterface(1)
00398         #r+="\n"+s
00399         funcs_rels+=s
00400         funcs_defs+="\n "+def_f+";"
00401         
00402         jel_struct_native_declares+="\n"+f.toJelatineJNISignatureDescriptor()
00403         #print s
00404     headers_defs=r
00405     return (headers_defs,funcs_defs,funcs_rels,jel_struct_native_declares)
00406 def gen_jni_inteface_to_file(src_fname):
00407     fi=open(src_fname)
00408     src_data=fi.readlines()
00409     fi.close()
00410     funcs=load_jni_interfaces(src_data)
00411     if 0:
00412         for f in funcs:
00413             print str(f)
00414     headers_defs,funcs_defs,funcs_rels,jel_struct_native_declares=gen_jelatine_jni_interfaces(funcs)
00415     fo=open(src_fname+".gen.c","w")
00416     fo.write(headers_defs)
00417     fo.write("\n#include \"my_new_ext.h\"\n")
00418     fo.write(funcs_rels)
00419     fo.close()
00420     fo=open(src_fname+".gen.h","w")
00421     fo.write(headers_defs)
00422     #fo.write()
00423     fo.write(funcs_defs)
00424     fo.close()
00425     fo=open(src_fname+"_ar_struct.h","w")
00426     fo.write("""#indef __MY_NEW_EXT1_H__
00427 #define __MY_NEW_EXT1_H__
00428 
00429 """)
00430     fo.write(jel_struct_native_declares)
00431     fo.write("""
00432 #endif
00433 """)
00434     fo.close()
00435     print "Complete gen "+str(len(funcs))+" prototypes native functions!"
00436 if __name__=="__main__":
00437     gen_jni_inteface_to_file(r'C:\algoritm\leJosDevSrc\classes\native_mod.rep')
00438
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:27 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
